task:
FreeCAD is open with /home/user/Documents/pipe.FCStd, which contains a single Part::Cylinder named 'Cylinder' (Radius 10, Height 40).

Export the 'Cylinder' object as a 'STEP (*.step *.stp)' file to exactly /home/user/exports/pipe.step (creating /home/user/exports/ if necessary), then save the FCStd document.

verification.description: STEP file has ISO-10303-21 header and entities
